description_long: This is a round pizza with a thick, golden-brown crust and a slightly raised edge, giving it a classic hand-tossed appearance. The surface is generously covered with melted cheese, which has browned in spots, and scattered slices of pepperoni that add a reddish hue. The cheese appears to be mozzarella, with a smooth, slightly oily finish, and the pepperoni is distributed unevenly across the top. The pizza sits directly on a flat, white surface, with no visible packaging or tray. The crust is puffy and airy, with a soft, bread-like texture, while the center is flatter and more densely topped. There are no visible cut lines, indicating the pizza is whole and uncut.
description: A whole, round pizza with a thick, golden-brown crust, topped with melted cheese and scattered pepperoni slices. The pizza is uncut and sits on a plain white surface.
description_view_0: The pizza is seen from a slightly angled side, showing the thick, puffy crust and a good distribution of cheese and pepperoni.
description_view_1: This view highlights the even browning of the crust and a more centered look at the cheese and pepperoni topping.
description_view_2: The pizza's crust appears slightly lighter, and the cheese coverage is more prominent, with pepperoni less visible from this angle.
description_view_3: The pizza is viewed from another side, showing a well-risen crust and a few visible pepperoni slices on the cheese surface.
